{"name": "数值分流处理", "ops": [{"op": "add_node", "node": {"id": "start", "type": "trigger", "config": {"kind": "manual", "payloadSchema": {"data": "number"}}}}, {"op": "add_node", "node": {"id": "process", "type": "tool", "config": {"callable": "fn_x", "args": {"input": "{{ payload.data }}"}}}}, {"op": "add_node", "node": {"id": "route", "type": "case", "config": {"expression": "has(payload.result) && payload.result > 100", "branches": {"high": {"to": "handle_high"}, "low": {"to": "handle_low"}}}}}, {"op": "add_node", "node": {"id": "handle_high", "type": "tool", "config": {"callable": "fn_high", "args": {"value": "{{ payload.result }}"}}}}, {"op": "add_node", "node": {"id": "handle_low", "type": "tool", "config": {"callable": "fn_low", "args": {"value": "{{ payload.result }}"}}}}, {"op": "co

{"name": "条件路由演示", "ops": [{"op": "add_node", "node": {"id": "trigger", "type": "trigger", "config": {"kind": "manual", "payloadSchema": {"input": "number"}}}}, {"op": "add_node", "node": {"id": "process", "type": "tool", "config": {"callable": "fn_x", "args": {"data": "{{ payload.input }}"}}}}, {"op": "add_node", "node": {"id": "route", "type": "case", "config": {"expression": "payload.result > 100", "branches": {"大于100": {"to": "high"}, "_default": {"to": "low"}}}}}, {"op": "add_node", "node": {"id": "high", "type": "tool", "config": {"callable": "fn_high", "args": {"value": "{{ payload.result }}"}}}}, {"op": "add_node", "node": {"id": "low", "type": "tool", "config": {"callable": "fn_low", "args": {"value": "{{ payload.result }}"}}}}, {"op": "connect", "from": "trigger", "to": "process"

{"name": "数值分流处理", "ops": [{"op": "add_node", "node": {"id": "start", "type": "trigger", "config": {"kind": "manual", "payloadSchema": {"data": "number"}}}}, {"op": "add_node", "node": {"id": "process", "type": "tool", "config": {"callable": "fn_x", "args": {"input": "{{ payload.data }}"}}}}, {"op": "add_node", "node": {"id": "route", "type": "case", "config": {"expression": "payload.result > 100 ? \"high\" : \"low\"", "branches": {"high": {"to": "high_handler"}, "low": {"to": "low_handler"}}}}}, {"op": "add_node", "node": {"id": "high_handler", "type": "tool", "config": {"callable": "fn_high", "args": {"value": "{{ payload.result }}"}}}}, {"op": "add_node", "node": {"id": "low_handler", "type": "tool", "config": {"callable": "fn_low", "args": {"value": "{{ payload.result }}"}}}}, {"op": "
